{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Golden Crown
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Golden Crown serves as the official symbol for the [[Champion’s Guild]]. It is also an item of regalia worn by the Emperor, appearing as a gleaming gold piece on his head that functions to concentrate his anger and [[willpower]]. In certain contexts, the crown is used as a visual component of imperial attire to help an individual project the appearance and presence of an Emperor.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Golden Crown]] is a small, golden pin with the image of a crown that serves as the symbol of the [[Champion’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] wears a [[Golden Crown{{!}}golden crown]] on his head.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
